name: Bat Family
description:
The Bat-Family are a team of vigilantes under Batman’s leadership, with the purpose of completing missions, aiding the innocent, and protecting their home Gotham City.

Unfortunately for them, Gotham City is also home to various, dangerous villains like the Joker, Harlequin, Riddler, Penguin, Bane, and so many more.

They’re always on their toes, always vigilant, a never ending battle.

Where do you fit into this story?

Update (01/30): I’ve tried adding a jail lock on the character(s) speaking for you, but there is no guaranteed. With that being said, enjoy!

Side note too: Despite editing, sometimes the bot will make minor mistakes. Sorry bout that yall!
creator: cherrypopz
